headline: DMV Fantasy: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: DMV Fantasy is projected #10 of 16 with a 592.00 projected-starting-lineup C-AVI total, led by Jayden Daniels, Saquon Barkley, and George Kittle. The immediate priority is improving the FLEX slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Sum of the eight verified projected starters' C-AVI values from all 16 AVI-Core team files

dynasty_power.method: Sum of every verified rostered player's D-AVI value from all 16 AVI-Core team files

latest_trade.summary: On July 15, DMV Fantasy traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired George Kittle, Brenton Strange, 2026 Round 1 (Conquistadors), 2028 Round 1 (Big Balder Brand) while sending Trey McBride. George Kittle is now the current TE starter at 80.3 C-AVI and 82.4 D-AVI; Brenton Strange is now the current FLEX starter at 61.9 C-AVI and 77.4 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the FLEX slot above Rachaad White's 57.2 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 83.4 C-AVI would directly attack the 26.20-point projected gap to Badland Banditos.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On July 8, Gringo’s Goblins traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired Tre' Harris, Emeka Egbuka, Kyren Williams, 2027 Round 1 (Big Balder Brand) while sending Omarion Hampton, Chris Godwin, A.J. Brown, 2027 Round 2 (Gringo’s Goblins). Tre' Harris is now on the current roster at 41.0 C-AVI and 64.4 D-AVI; Emeka Egbuka is now the current WR starter at 85.5 C-AVI and 86.5 D-AVI; Kyren Williams is now the current RB starter at 83.3 C-AVI and 83.8 D-AVI; The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

Brown, 2027 Round 2 (Gringo’s Goblins). Tre' Harris is now on the current roster at 41.0 C-AVI and 64.4 D-AVI; Emeka Egbuka is now the current WR starter at 85.5 C-AVI and 86.5 D-AVI; Kyren Williams is now the current RB starter at 83.3 C-AVI and 83.8 D-AVI; The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #10 of 16 at 592.00 lineup C-AVI. Badland Banditos is immediately above at 618.20, a gap of 26.20. Gringo’s Goblins is immediately behind at 564.20.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jayden Daniels (96.1), Saquon Barkley (92.0), and George Kittle (80.3).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On July 15, DMV Fantasy traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired George Kittle, Brenton Strange, 2026 Round 1 (Conquistadors), 2028 Round 1 (Big Balder Brand) while sending Trey McBride. George Kittle is now the current TE starter at 80.3 C-AVI and 82.4 D-AVI; Brenton Strange is now the current FLEX starter at 61.9 C-AVI and 77.4 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the FLEX slot above Rachaad White's 57.2 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 83.4 C-AVI would directly attack the 26.20-point projected gap to Badland Banditos. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Rachaad White is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 57.2. Any acquisition should clear that exact lineup threshold.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 11 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
